trending_up+12% Conversation Reach

Why traditional learning feels heavy

Other apps teach you "weird, unvalidated words" just to fill levels. We've done the data-science for you.

inventory_2

No Deck Buying

Don't waste money on external word lists. Our 1,500 words are already curated and verified.

block

Useless Filler

Most apps prioritize "apple" and "dog". We prioritize "I think", "I need", and "because".

analytics

Zero Validation

Typical lessons aren't based on real speech data. Ours are ranked by billions of real subtitles.

timer_off

Wasted Effort

Spend months learning things you'll never say. Focus on the 20% that does 80% of the work.

The Road to 1,500 Mastery

Every word brings you closer to real-world freedom.

restaurant

100 Essential

Basic survival & greetings

Unlocked

Order food at a restaurant, greet neighbors, and ask for directions without panic.

check_circleOrdering Coffee
check_circleMarket Haggling
forum

250 Fundamental

Daily life & simple conversations

Unlocked

Hold basic 5-minute conversations about your day, your work, and your family.

check_circleDaily Small Talk
check_circleWork Basics
podcasts

500 Core

Follow simple media

Current Level

Understand the "vibe" of any podcast and read simple social media posts without a dictionary.

check_circleSlow News Podcasts
check_circleIG/TikTok Stories
movie

1000 Advanced

Real content with subtitles

Locked

Understand 70% of Netflix Originals and read short children's novels (El Principito).

lockNetflix Originals
lockGraphic Novels
celebration

1500 Mastery

80% of Everyday Spanish

Ultimate Goal

The magic threshold. Fluent real-world understanding and the ability to express complex thoughts.

lockNative Sitcoms
lockLive News

The smarter way to track progress

Word Reach™

Instead of points, we show you your "Conversation Reach". Watch your percentage grow from 5% to 80% as you master the list.

80%
psychology

Smart Spacing

Our tracker remembers what you forget. We re-introduce words right before they slip away.

visibility

Content Matching

The app suggests YouTube videos and articles where you already know 90%+ of the words.

No More Vague Levels

"Intermediate" means nothing. "Knowing 1,200 words" means you can understand the Spanish news.

query_statsLive Vocabulary Analytics

How we're different

FeatureMost Common SpanishOther Apps
Word QualityRanked by billions of real subtitlesTextbook words like "pencil"
List OwnershipComplete curated 1,500 includedBuy separate decks/levels
Progress GoalSpecific "Word Mastery" countArbitrary XP and streaks
The End GameUnlocking real Netflix/BooksStaying inside the app forever
